ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "author" TEXT /* Username of the comment author */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "approved_comment" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is approved */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who posted the comment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to post the comment */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been edited */,
  "last_edit_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last edit */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the comment (e.g., pending, approved, rejected, flagged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "author" TEXT /* Username of the post author */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity on the post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "level" TEXT /* Moderation level (e.g., basic, advanced, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the moderator */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Training level of the moderator (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the moderator (e.g., on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the moderation action (e.g., approved, rejected, flagged) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the moderation action */,
  "review_duration" TEXT /* Time taken to review the comment */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user regarding the moderation action */,
  "reviewed_by_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment was reviewed by an admin */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for further review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
